en.summary: Adaptive foregrounds now follow each theme's real UI surfaces, while targeted readability repair preserves the complete theme when Codex native colors conflict.
highlights: Text keeps a restrained theme tint and moves gradually toward black, white, or gray only as far as the actual component surface requires.
Solid backgrounds, image scenes, quiet workspace glass, raised cards, dialogs, the composer, sidebars, placeholders, and semantic icons share one contrast model.
A stale Codex foreground now triggers a scoped high-priority repair and a second health check instead of immediately removing semantic styling.
Styler colors take priority while a theme is active; one-click restore removes every override and returns appearance control to Codex.
fixes: Fixed black Codex text becoming unreadable on dark or image-backed Styler surfaces when Codex itself used a light appearance.
Fixed the inverse white-text conflict on light Styler surfaces.
Fixed recoverable foreground conflicts unnecessarily dropping component surfaces, icons, layout treatments, and other semantic theme effects.
Kept conservative fallback for missing application roots, removed runtime styles, failed repairs, and other genuine structural failures.

zh-CN.summary: 自适应前景色现在会依据主题中真实的 UI 表面进行计算；当 Codex 原生颜色发生冲突时，局部可读性修复会优先保留完整主题效果。
highlights: 文字会保留克制的主题色倾向，并只按实际组件表面的需要逐步向黑、白或灰过渡，而不是突然切成纯黑或纯白。
纯色背景、图片场景、工作区玻璃表面、卡片、对话框、输入框、侧栏、占位文字与语义图标现在使用同一套对比度模型。
检测到 Codex 遗留前景色时，会先应用高优先级的局部修复并再次健康检查，不再立即撤掉语义主题。
主题生效期间由 Styler 接管语义颜色；一键恢复会完整移除覆盖并把外观控制权交还给 Codex。
fixes: 修复 Codex 自身为亮色外观时，黑色文字在深色或图片型 Styler 表面上不可读的问题。
修复 Codex 自身为暗色外观时，白色文字与浅色 Styler 表面冲突的反向问题。
修复可恢复的前景色冲突导致组件表面、图标、布局处理和其他完整主题效果被不必要降级的问题。
应用根缺失、运行时样式被移除、局部修复仍失败等真实结构异常仍会安全回退。
